emails.subject: RE: credit Guaranty
emails.body: RE: credit Guaranty Who is your credit approval person? Please have that person email or call Marie and me.

emails.subject: RE: credit Guaranty
emails.body: It was Mark wilson who is no longer here. I am trying to get a new name from the London people. Assuming they approve this what is the turnaround you think?

emails.subject: RE: credit Guaranty
emails.body: Tom: I just received a phone call from Bear Stearns inquiring about an Enron Corp. guaranty for the ECT Europe Finance, Inc. brokerage account. Have you received approval from credit? If so, what is the amount of the guaranty? Are we keeping the Enron Credit Inc. brokerage account or are we transferring all positions to the ECT Europe Finance, Inc. account? If so, are we terminating the outstanding guaranty of the Enron Credit Inc. account which was amended to provide for a $100,000,000 cap? Please advise me and credit of the status. Thanks. Sara

emails.subject: RE: credit Guaranty
emails.body: Sara, I spoke with Jeff and as we are winding down the book he asked that we just draw this out a little bit. He feels it is not going to be needed as the book is going away. Also there is no intention of moving any securities from one entity to the other. Thanks, Tom

emails.subject: RE: credit Guaranty
emails.body: Our London accounting group informed us that we needed to transfer positions held in Anker Coal from Enron Credit Inc to a Fair Value Entity, that was a US entitiy, rolling to EEL, that was set up to own brokerage accounts. The ECTEF entity is the result. Should you need more details let me know. Tom
